inputs.label: Annual Tuition
inputs.businessContext: Annual tuition and fees charged by the college

inputs.label: Annual Living Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Annual cost of housing, food, transportation, and personal expenses

inputs.label: Annual Books & Supplies
inputs.businessContext: Annual cost of textbooks, supplies, and equipment

inputs.label: Duration of Study
inputs.businessContext: Expected number of years to complete the program

inputs.label: Annual Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual increase in college costs

inputs.label: Annual Scholarship
inputs.businessContext: Annual amount of scholarships or grants that do not need repayment

formulas.grossTotal: (() => { let sum = 0; for (let i = 0; i < years; i++) { sum += (tuition + living + books) * Math.pow(1 + inflation/100, i); } return sum; })()
